name: Feature Request

## Describe the Enhancement

What would you like to see added or changed in the specification?

## Research Basis

Is this grounded in specific research? Please cite if possible.

## Which Principle or Layer Does This Affect?

Describe which part of the specification this relates to.

## Testing

Have you tested this modification? What were the results?
